name: First National Bank And Trust Co. Of Bottineau
description_short: Community bank in Bottineau, ND offering traditional banking services including checking, savings, loans, credit cards, and digital banking with local trust services.
description_long:
First National Bank and Trust Company of Bottineau is a regional community bank based in Bottineau, North Dakota, operating from its main location at 424 Main Street. The bank has been serving its local community as a full-service financial institution with a stated philosophy that 'First National Bank depends on its customers, and its customers depend on us.' The institution operates both lobby and drive-up services during standard business hours.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including deposit accounts, loans, credit cards, debit cards, and digital banking solutions. Customers can access accounts 24/7 through FirstBottineau Digital Banking via mobile apps on Apple and Google Play stores, featuring mobile check deposit capabilities. The bank also provides bill pay services through online banking, trust services, and eStatement enrollment. Additionally, FNB operates an affiliated insurance agency (First National Insurance Agency of Bottineau) to serve customer insurance needs.

What distinguishes First National Bank is its emphasis on local community banking combined with modern digital capabilities. The bank offers both traditional in-person banking (lobby hours 8:30am-3:30pm weekdays) and extended drive-up access (8am-5pm weekdays), plus around-the-clock digital banking. The inclusion of a dedicated trust services division and affiliated insurance agency indicates broader wealth management capabilities for a community bank of this size.

As a regional community bank, FNB serves customers seeking traditional banking relationships with local decision-making and personalized service. However, customers should be aware that as a smaller institution, loan and deposit product offerings may be more limited compared to national banks, and fees/rates are not published online. The bank's focus on standard business hours and single physical location may not suit customers requiring extensive branch networks or 24/7 in-person service. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Credit cards with rewards points management
24/7 digital banking platform with login access
Mobile banking app (iOS and Android) with mobile check deposit
Secure file sharing via Citrix ShareFile
Debit and credit card services management and application
Insurance services through affiliated First National Insurance Agency of Bottineau
pros: 24/7 digital banking access with mobile apps available on Apple and Google Play stores
Mobile check deposit feature allowing deposits anytime, anywhere through the mobile app
Dual service model with both lobby (8:30am-3:30pm) and extended drive-up hours (8am-5pm)
Free eStatement enrollment as paperless alternative to traditional statements
Dedicated trust services division available for estate and wealth management
Affiliated insurance agency (First National Insurance Agency) for one-stop financial services
Bill pay functionality through online banking with same-business-day processing for electronic payees
cons: Single physical location in Bottineau limits accessibility for customers outside immediate area
Limited online transparency—loan rates, credit card terms, and deposit product details not published on website
Lobby hours restricted to 8:30am-3:30pm weekdays only, no Saturday/Sunday in-person banking
No mention of minimum deposit requirements, account fees, or overdraft policies on website
Small community bank status may mean fewer product options and less competitive rates compared to national banks
best_for: Bottineau, ND residents and local business owners seeking relationship-based community banking
Customers who value combined banking and insurance services from a single local provider
Users comfortable with digital banking who also want option for in-person service with known local staff
Small to mid-sized local businesses needing trust services and commercial lending relationships
diagnosis: First National Bank and Trust Company of Bottineau is best suited for residents of Bottineau, ND and surrounding areas who value personalized community banking relationships with modern digital convenience. The main caveat is that as a single-location regional bank, it lacks the branch network of national banks and provides limited online transparency regarding rates, fees, and specific product terms, requiring direct contact for detailed information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community bank in Bottineau, ND offering checking, savings, loans, credit cards, and digital banking with trust services.
fdic_official_name: First National Bank and Trust Co. of Bottineau
